case_title: S.G. BHAKTA & SONS, INC vs. TOMPKINS, RITA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 405 VALENCIA STREET #514, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,865.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,865.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-15-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO VACATE BY 9AM ON OR BEFORE 1-15-97 AND RETURN KEYS TO PLTF. DISPOSITION OF ANY SECURITY DEPOSIT ACCORDING TO LAW. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES & COSTS. GENERAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS.IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY AND PAYS JUDGMNT, DEFT MAY HAVE JUDGMNT DEEMED SATISFIED OR SET ASIDE & DISMISSED.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MENDEZ, DAVID GERARD SUBSTITUTED FOR BROOKS, DAVID EDWARDS AS ATTORNEY FOR S.G. BHAKTA & SONS, INC
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.G. BHAKTA & SONS, INC SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-18-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.G. BHAKTA & SONS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA JIMENEZ, FILIPE JIMENEZ SUMMONS ISSUED

#1, JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID GELLMAN - RPT,GORDON AIAVAO - CLERK, GUY DECKER C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/DAVID MENDEZ AS COUNSEL. DEF. RITA TOMPKINS PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 405 VALENCIA ST, #514, S.F, CA. - $1,865 RENT & DAMAGES - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 1-15-97,5PM - IF DEF. VACATES AS AGREED ALL RENT & DAMAGES ARE WVD.- $540 DEPOSIT W/INTEREST REFUNDED TO DEF. - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - EACH PARTY BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - DEF. CERTIFIES SHE IS THE ONLY PARTY WITH RIGHT OF POSSESSION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
